briefdescription.para: 0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid
0x0E Only RSA and ECDSA are supported
0x10 Revocation ID is out of range
0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption
0x16 Size mismatch for data remaining for decryption
0x1B RSA ENC 0xbc value is not matched
0x1C RSA PSS verification hash is not matched
0x1D Keysrc should be efuse black key for enc only
0x1E PUFHD location should be from eFuse for enc only
0x1F eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x20 eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x21 Metahdr IV Range not matched with eFuse IV
0x22 Metahdr DpaCm & eFuse DpaCm values are not matched
0x29 Error encrypted data is not 128 bit aligned
0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x33 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x34 Error when partition hash comparison is failed
0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid
0x0E Only RSA and ECDSA are supported
0x10 Revocation ID is out of range
0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption
0x16 Size mismatch for data remaining for decryption
0x1B RSA ENC 0xbc value is not matched
0x1C RSA PSS verification hash is not matched
0x1D Keysrc should be efuse black key for enc only
0x1E PUFHD location should be from eFuse for enc only
0x1F eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x20 eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x21 Metahdr IV Range not matched with eFuse IV
0x22 Metahdr DpaCm & eFuse DpaCm values are not matched
0x29 Error encrypted data is not 128 bit aligned
0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when secure state config measurement failed
0x2C Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x34 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x35 Error when partition hash comparison is failed
0x37 - Error in LMS sign verification due to error in SHA operation
0x38 - Error in LMS sign verification due to invalid public key size

0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x33 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x34 Error when partition hash comparison is failed

Structure to hold SEC error codes.
0x06 PPK HAsh is all zero hence inavalid
0x0E Only RSA and ECDSA are supported
0x10 Revocation ID is out of range
0x14 Invalid key source selected for decryption
0x16 Size mismatch for data remaining for decryption
0x1B RSA ENC 0xbc value is not matched
0x1C RSA PSS verification hash is not matched
0x1D Keysrc should be efuse black key for enc only
0x1E PUFHD location should be from eFuse for enc only
0x1F eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x20 eFuse IV should be non-zero for enc only
0x21 Metahdr IV Range not matched with eFuse IV
0x22 Metahdr DpaCm & eFuse DpaCm values are not matched

0x31 Error when RED key clear failed
0x32 Error when ECC curve is not supported and trying to access
0x33 Error when partition hash is not present for respective partition
0x34 Error when partition hash comparison is failed

This function is supported only for Versalnet, nothing to be done in Versal.
This function updates KEK red key availability status from boot header.
This function provides Obfuscated Aes Key source.

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the current DecKeyMask
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi
is the current DecKeyMask
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the Key source given in Pdi.
is the current DecKeyMask.
is the pointer to the calculated KeySrc.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function runs the KAT for RSA.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
specifies the required length.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.

listitem.para: XLOADER_SEC_BUF_CLEAR_ERR if failed to clear buffer.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XSecure_Sha3 instance.
is pointer in which output of this function will be stored.
specifies the required length.
is pointer which holds the input data for which mask should be calculated which should be 48 bytes length.

briefdescription.para: This function checks the JTAG device state change.

para.verbatim: When Secure gate is opened from close state this API raises an error, if the gate is closed and re-opened again this function recognizes the state change and performs the action configured.

parameterdescription.para: is of pointer of void type.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function calls the client API to get optional data from PDI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XLoader_ClientInstance instance

briefdescription.para: This function calls the client API to validate authenticated PDI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XLoader_ClientInstance instance

detaileddescription.para: Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register

briefdescription.para: Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.
Address of BBRAM_8 register used to store CL params.
Address of register to read the value in BBRAM_8 register.
Mask to get the value of counter in Configuration Limiter register.
Mask to get the value of mode in Configuration Limiter register.
Shift to get the value of mode in Configuration Limiter register.
Mask to get the value of Feature enable in Configuration Limiter register.
Number of failed configurations selected as mode for Configuration Limiter.
Number of failed configurations selected as mode for Configuration Limiter.
Value when Configuration Limiter feature is enabled.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.

detaileddescription.para: Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register

briefdescription.para: Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 0 register.
Mask to enable required instructions in Instruction Mask 1 register.
Data ID of the optional data.
DDR address or OSPI offset where PDI is available; mandatory when PDI_SRC is DDR or OSPI.
PDI ID of the PDI available in Image Store.

detaileddescription.para: Mandatory option when PDI_SRC is selected as Image Store

briefdescription.para: Error when buffer size given by user is less than the optional data length.
Address where authenticated PDI is available.
XLOADER_PDI_TYPE_FULL for full PDI XLOADER_PDI_TYPE_PARTIAL for partial PDI.
This file illustrates parsing of PDI to get optional data from Image Header Table.

detaileddescription.para: This file illustrates validation of authenticated PDI.
The PDI can be available in either DDR or image store.
To build this application, xilmailbox library must be included in BSP and xilloader library must be in client mode.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 har 02/16/24 Initial release 1.10 obs 12/31/25 Fixed GCC warnings 1.11 vm 03/30/26 Added support for OSPI as pdi source to get the optional data

para.heading: Procedure to link and compile the example for the default ddr less designs

detaileddescription.para: The default linker settings places a software stack, heap and data in DDR memory. For this example to work, any data shared between client running on A72/R5/PL and server running on PMC, should be placed in area which is accessible to both client and server.
To keep things simple, by default the cache is disabled for this example
To build this application, xilmailbox library must be included in BSP and xilloader library must be in client mode and xilsecure must be in client mode
This example is supported for Versal Net and Versal 2Ve 2Vm devices.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.00 har 12/11/23 Initial release kpt 10/04/24 Added support to validate authentication enabled partial PDI 2.40 sri 03/26/26 Included common client header file for cache disable option

para.heading: Procedure to link and compile the example for the default ddr less designs

detaileddescription.para: The default linker settings places a software stack, heap and data in DDR memory. For this example to work, any data shared between client running on A72/R5/PL and server running on PMC, should be placed in area which is accessible to both client and server.
To keep things simple, by default the cache is disabled for this example
